testcase.name: test_hr_login
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_new_features_v2.py:27: in hr_token assert countries_res.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ceo_login

error.message: failed on setup with "AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_new_features_v2.py:46: in ceo_token india = next((c for c in countries if c.get('name', '').lower() == 'india'), None) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_new_features_v2.py:46: in <genexpr> india = next((c for c in countries if c.get('name', '').lower() == 'india'), None) ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
